name: Avra Inc.
summary: Avra Inc., a development stage company, focuses on the provision of solutions in the cryptocurrency and digital currency markets worldwide. It primarily focuses on offering payment solutions to businesses. The company also provides AvraSecure, a range of server security, hosting, and management services that provide managed and co-managed security solutions to meet the security and infrastructure needs of organizations. In addition, it markets and distributes Smart TV boxes to home consumers. Avra Inc. was founded in 2010 and is based in Santo Domingo, the Dominican Republic.
